title: Book and Quick Save
description: Saving your writing progress when you can't. Never discard your text without confirmation ever again!
body:
# Book and Quick Save
**Experience peace of mind while writing your books in Minecraft. Your progress will never be lost without proper confirmation due to accidental actions, i.e. ESC-presses or disconnections. Rest easy knowing your hard work will be saved to the hardcover!**

# ✅ Features
- **Confirmation Screen** will prompt you whether you meant to discard your changes when pressing ESC or E after editing your Book and Quill.
- **Automatic Save** when you've made changes and the GUI closes without confirmation, for instance when you get timed out, kicked or die.
- **Client-side**, so that only you need to have the mod, not the server

# 📷 Visuals
![Confirmation Screen in Minecraft, the title is "You have made changes to the book", the question is "Are you sure you want to close the book without saving?", and there are two buttons "Yes" and "Back"](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/91nYUvz1/images/915b32c14f39ac1d08d937ae074e3e83dd0a0327.png)
